title: Triple Threat
description: Three movies in one: Wolf Woods, The Barber, and Smile. Legend calls it the scariest movie ever that no one has ever survived to see the end. Proceed if you dare.
quote: Do you have a feeling like we’re being watched?
altHero: red eyes peering out from the bushes
alt1: a teen couple embracing and screaming
alt2: black and white shot of a guy in a barber’s chair and a looming silhouette with scissors
alt3: from behind, a little girl in pigtails swinging on a swingset
